summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Ofertas module restructuring. All 10 features tested and working correctly: table listing view, 5 columns (ID Oferta, Remitente, Fecha de Cargue, Estado, Acción), Ver button, detail view with full offer info, Volver al listado button, Asignar Vehículos button, Eliminar Oferta button for SIN ASIGNAR estado, estado filter with all 7 states, search functionality, and Nueva Oferta navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper state management for table/detail view toggle
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Estado badge colors correctly mapped per state type (sin-asignar=yellow, asignado=blue, en-proceso=amber, en-ruta=green, pendiente-doc=pink, finalizada=green-border)
Conditional button rendering correctly handles SIN ASIGNAR (Eliminar) and ASIGNADO (Cancelar) states
Search and filter functionality properly debounced (300ms)
Detail view sections well organized: Ubicación, Vehículos, Carga, Flete, Remitente/Destinatario
seed_data_creation: Used existing offer (2026-04-00001-0001, Remitente: Doria, Estado: Sin Asignar)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ofertas module restructured from cards to table view. All features working: table with 5 columns, Ver button opens detail view (state-managed, not separate route), detail shows full offer info in sections, action buttons conditional on estado (Eliminar for SIN ASIGNAR, Cancelar for ASIGNADO, nothing for other states), estado filter has all 7 states, search works, Nueva Oferta navigates to /creacion-ofertas.

tests_executed.test: Ofertas page shows TABLE listing (not cards)
tests_executed.details: Table with data-table class renders correctly with proper styling

tests_executed.test: Table has 5 columns: ID Oferta, Remitente, Fecha de Cargue, Estado, Acción
tests_executed.details: All 5 column headers present and correctly labeled
Ver button with Eye icon present in each row

tests_executed.test: Clicking 'Ver' opens detail view with full offer info
tests_executed.details: Detail view shows Ubicación, Vehículos, Carga, Flete, Remitente/Destinatario sections

tests_executed.test: Detail view has 'Volver al listado' button that returns to table
tests_executed.details: Button works correctly, returns to table view
Orange button with Truck icon present

tests_executed.test: For offers with estado 'SIN ASIGNAR': detail shows 'Eliminar Oferta' button
tests_executed.details: Red Eliminar Oferta button shown for SIN ASIGNAR estado

tests_executed.test: Estado filter dropdown includes all 7 new states
tests_executed.details: All states present: Todos los estados, SIN ASIGNAR, ASIGNADO, EN PROCESO DE CARGUE, EN RUTA, EN PROCESO DE DESCARGUE, PENDIENTE DOCUMENTACIÓN, FINALIZADA

tests_executed.test: Search works in the table view
tests_executed.details: Search for 'Doria' returns 1 row, search for non-existent term shows empty state
Button navigates correctly to offer creation wizard

tests_executed.test: Estado badge colors are correct per state type
tests_executed.details: SIN ASIGNAR badge has yellow background (#fef3c7) with brown text (#92400e)
